---
title: "⚾ MLB 球隊戰力預測報告"
date: last-modified
format:
  html:
    theme: cosmo
    toc: true
    embed-resources: true
    include-in-header:
      - text: |
          <link rel="manifest" href="manifest.json">
          <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
          <script>
            if ('serviceWorker' in navigator) {
              window.addEventListener('load', () => {
                navigator.serviceWorker.register('sw.js');
              });
            }
          </script>
jupyter: python3
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
---

## 📊 模型預測結果

```{python}
import pandas as pd
pred = pd.read_csv('../outputs/predictions.csv')
from IPython.display import HTML, display
display_df = pred[['team', 'actual_win_pct', 'model_strength_prob']].copy()
display_df['model_strength_prob'] = display_df['model_strength_prob'].apply(lambda x: f"{x:.1%}")
display_df['actual_win_pct'] = display_df['actual_win_pct'].apply(lambda x: f"{x:.3f}")
display_df.columns = ['球隊', '實際勝率', '模型預測強隊機率']
HTML(display_df.to_html(index=False, classes='table table-striped'))
import plotly.express as px
fig = px.histogram(pred, x='model_strength_prob', nbins=20,
                    title='球隊戰力預測分布',
                    labels={'model_strength_prob': '預測強隊機率', 'count': '球隊數'})
fig.show()
本報告由自動化管線每日更新 | 最後更新時間：{{< meta date >}}
